name: DCENT-SST-I
citation: Chan, D., Gebbie, G., Huybers, P., and Kent, E. C. (2024). A Dynamically Consistent ENsemble of Temperature at the Earth Surface since 1850 from the DCENT dataset. Scientific Data, 11, 953. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-024-03742-x.

Chan, D., Chan, S. C., Siddons, J. T., Cable, A., Cornes, R. C., Kent, E. C., Gebbie, G., and Huybers, P. (2026). DCENT-I: A Globally Infilled Extension of the Dynamically Consistent ENsemble of Temperature Dataset. Geoscience Data Journal. https://doi.org/10.1002/gdj3.70054.
data_citation: Chan, Duo; Chan, Steven; Siddons, Joseph; Cable, Archie; Cornes, Richard; Kent, Elizabeth; Gebbie, Geoffrey; Huybers, Peter, 2025, "DCENT-I: A Globally Infilled Extension of the Dynamically Consistent ENsemble of Temperature Dataset", Harvard Dataverse, V1. https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/ROG38Q.

DCENT-I ocean annual and monthly summary statistics source files are project-provided time-series source files. For public repository use, cite the canonical Dataverse landing page and place the source files under DATADIR rather than committing private share URLs.
acknowledgement: DCENT-I data were obtained from the DCENT-I project and Harvard Dataverse. Record the exact access date, source service, source file, and whether the file was obtained from Dataverse, CEDA, Google Cloud, or the project-provided ocean summary file.
notes: The strict formatted DCENT-I output uses the monthly ocean surface temperature statistics file as the active processing source. The workflow reads the monthly ocean-statistics anomaly series, checks complete monthly coverage, annualizes by arithmetic mean, rebases the annual series to 1991-2020, and writes outputs/tables/sst_DCENT_SST_I.csv. The annual ocean-statistics file is retained only as an optional validation or cross-check source and is not selected by scripts/data_management/build_sst_outputs.py --strict.

url: manual:DCENT-I monthly ocean statistics source. Canonical landing page: https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/ROG38Q. Place DCENT_DCENT_I_OST_monthly_statistics.txt under $DATADIR/ManagedData/SeaSurfaceTemperature/Data/DCENT-SST-I/.

manual:DCENT-I annual ocean statistics cross-check source. Canonical landing page: https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/ROG38Q. Place DCENT_DCENT_I_OST_annual_statistics_embargo.txt under $DATADIR/ManagedData/SeaSurfaceTemperature/Data/DCENT-SST-I/annual_statistics/.
